inputs.label: Number
inputs.businessContext: The number to convert to standard form.

businessContext_i18n.en: The number to convert to standard form.
businessContext_i18n.de: Die Zahl, die in die Standardform umgewandelt werden soll.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Le nombre à convertir en forme standard.
businessContext_i18n.es: El número a convertir a forma estándar.

inputs.label: Significant Figures
inputs.businessContext: Number of significant figures for the coefficient.

businessContext_i18n.en: Number of significant figures for the coefficient.
businessContext_i18n.de: Anzahl signifikanter Stellen für den Koeffizienten.

businessContext_i18n.es: Número de cifras significativas para el coeficiente.

inputs.label: Rounding Mode
inputs.businessContext: 0: Round half up, 1: Round half to even (for precise rounding).

businessContext_i18n.en: 0: Round half up, 1: Round half to even (for precise rounding).
businessContext_i18n.tr: 0: Yarımı yukarı yuvarla, 1: Yarımı çifte yuvarla (hassas yuvarlama için).
businessContext_i18n.de: 0: Kaufmännisches Runden, 1: Mathematisches Runden (für präzises Runden).
businessContext_i18n.fr: 0 : Arrondi demi supérieur, 1 : Arrondi demi pair (pour un arrondi précis).
businessContext_i18n.es: 0: Redondear hacia arriba, 1: Redondear al par (para redondeo preciso).

suggestedActions: Review inputs and verify results against site standards.
